title: astragalus duanensis
intro: Astragalus duanensis, also known as Duan Jiaou or Duan Jiao, is a plant species in the legume family that is native to the mountainous regions of China. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Astragalus duanensis include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce fatigue, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections, such as bronchitis and pneumonia. Astragalus duanensis can be prepared in various forms, including dried root, capsule, and tea, making it a versatile herbal remedy.
